actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Sometimes it feels like life is a game, but it's a game you can't win.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes it feels like life is a game, but it's a game you can't always win

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to be humble in life, and then play it even though you don't always win .

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: It is difficult to play with a handicap.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: It is difficult to play the rules of life, but you still have to master them.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The first step is to kill your fear

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to face every obstacle in life, and the first step is to kill your fear.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: It is pointless to risk everything for the sake of a game.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to treasure everything in life, and it is pointless to risk everything for the sake of a game.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I've finally figured out the rules.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: I've finally figured out the rules of life, and will follow them as much as possible in order to be a winner in life.
